pages.raw_text:
Following is the order of march,
arranged today, for the parade next
Monday morning, Labor day:


PARADE FORMATION.


Grand marshal. David c. Coates /;
assistant grand marshal. A. W.
Swenson; general Labor day com.
mittee, Natatorium Park band
float, Spokane Sectional Central
Trades council. led by President H
A. Jarvis.


Provision Trades Section.


Aide, Fred Cardamone; float. bak,
ers' union, bartenders' union cigar.
makers, cooks, walters, Mattresses


Brewery Trades Section.


Aide, Fred r. Maddux; float, beer
drivers, bottlers, brewers. coopers


Printing Hrades Section.


Aide. Fred Barker: float, book
binders, engravers, mailers, press
men. press feeders, printers, stereo-
typers.


Miscellaneous Section.


Aide. w. A. Cliff; float. Card and
Label league, BARRIERS, Federal un-
ion 1924. Federal union 1922,
